title: Stalk And Pounce On Target Behavior
description: Allows a mob to stalk a target, then once within range pounce onto a target, on success the target will be attacked dealing damage defined by the attack component. On failure, the mob will risk getting stuck

interest_time.title: Interest Time
interest_time.description:
The amount of time the mob will be interested before pouncing. This happens when the mob is within range of pouncing

Sample values:
• fox: 2

leap_distance.title: Leap Distance
leap_distance.description: The distance in blocks the mob jumps in the direction of its target

leap_height.title: Leap Height
leap_height.description:
The height in blocks the mob jumps when leaping at its target

Sample values:
• fox: 0.9

max_stalk_dist.title: Max Stalk Dist
max_stalk_dist.description:
The maximum distance away a target can be before the mob gives up on stalking

Sample values:
• fox: 12

pounce_max_dist.title: Pounce Max Dist
pounce_max_dist.description:
The maximum distance away from the target in blocks to begin pouncing at the target

Sample values:
• fox: 5

set_persistent.title: Set Persistent
set_persistent.description: Allows the actor to be set to persist upon targeting a player

stalk_speed.title: Stalk Speed
stalk_speed.description:
The movement speed in which you stalk your target

Sample values:
• fox: 1.2

strike_dist.title: Strike Dist
strike_dist.description:
The max distance away from the target when landing from the pounce that will still result in damaging the target

Sample values:
• fox: 2

stuck_time.title: Stuck Time
stuck_time.description:
The amount of time the mob will be stuck if they fail and land on a block they can be stuck on

Sample values:
• fox: 2

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

stuck_blocks.title: Stuck Blocks
stuck_blocks.description:
Properties:
• test (string)
• subject (string)
• operator (string)
• value (string)

Sample values:
• fox: {"test":"is_block","subject":"block","operator"...
